auth.error_not_whitelisted: Your Twitch account is not authorized to use this app.
auth.error_access_denied: You declined the authorization. Please try again.
auth.error_invalid_state: Login session expired. Please try again.
auth.error_invalid_pkce: Login session expired. Please try again.

categories.title: Categories
categories.empty: No categories yet. Categories will be populated as streams are recorded.

channels.title: Channels
channels.empty: No channels yet. Channels will appear here as you follow broadcasters or configure download schedules.

errors.not_found_description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

videos.title: Videos
videos.empty: No videos yet. Trigger a download from a channel page.
videos.no_match: No videos match the current filters.
videos.no_match_loaded: No matches in loaded videos yet. More results are loading.
videos.tab_coming_soon: Coming soon — this view isn't wired up yet.
videos.force_h264: Force H.264 (for older devices / broader playback compatibility)
videos.force_h264_tooltip: When a channel offers HEVC, check this to download H.264 instead. HEVC gives smaller files; some devices and browsers can't play it.

history.heading: Stream timeline
history.description: Title and category changes captured during this recording, interleaved chronologically.
history.empty: No title or category history recorded. Enable title tracking in config.toml to capture mid-stream changes.

completion.partial_tooltip: This recording is missing data — the download was interrupted and the Twitch CDN rolled past the gap before we could resume, or the run failed mid-recording with only some parts saved.
completion.truncated_tooltip: Recorder ended before the broadcast did — a server interruption, an unresumable run, or a finalize that never saw the playlist's end marker. The file itself plays cleanly; the broadcast just continued past where we stopped.
completion.cancelled_tooltip: You stopped this recording manually while the broadcast was still live.

watch.not_ready: This video is not ready to play (status: {{status}}).
watch.switch_to_aside: Move history to the side of the player
watch.switch_to_wide: Move history below to make the player full-width

schedules.title: Auto-download schedules
schedules.description: When a channel goes live, matching schedules automatically start a download.
schedules.empty: No schedules yet. Create one above to auto-record a channel.
schedules.is_delete_rediff: Delete the video if the VOD is kept after the stream
schedules.is_delete_rediff_hint: Number of hours after the stream ends before the VOD is deleted
schedules.no_categories: No categories yet — they populate as streams go live.
schedules.no_tags: No tags yet — they populate as streams go live.
schedules.filters_coming_soon_hint: Stream signals aren't captured yet; these filters will be enabled in a later phase.

tasks.title: Scheduled tasks
tasks.description: Background jobs the scheduler runs on an interval.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Every session currently signed into this account. Revoke any that don't belong to a device you recognize.

whitelist.title: Whitelist
whitelist.description: When whitelist is enabled in the server config, only Twitch user IDs listed here can sign in.
whitelist.validation_numeric: Must be a numeric Twitch user ID

requests.empty: No requests yet. Request a download by clicking "Request" on any video detail page.

queue.title: Download queue
queue.description: Downloads currently running or waiting to start.

history.title: Download history
history.description: Completed and failed downloads. Filter by status to investigate failures.

events.title: Event logs
events.description: System-side events — task runs, downloads, auth outcomes.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: System events and outbound API calls in one place.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Display preferences applied across the dashboard.
settings.timezone_hint: IANA name, e.g. Europe/Paris. Defaults to UTC.

eventsub.title: EventSub
eventsub.description: Twitch EventSub webhook subscriptions and cost/quota history.
eventsub.env_managed_hint: Environment variables are active for this server.
eventsub.restart_hint: Saved. Restart the server to apply this mode.
eventsub.nudge_setup: ReplayVOD can't see when your channels go live yet. Turn on live detection to show live status and start scheduled recordings automatically.
eventsub.nudge_restart: EventSub settings changed. Restart the server to apply them.
eventsub.choose_mode: How should ReplayVOD detect live channels?
eventsub.mode_direct_desc: Twitch calls your server directly. Needs a public HTTPS address.
eventsub.mode_relay_desc: Route events through a relay when your server has no public address.
eventsub.mode_poll_desc: No webhook. ReplayVOD checks Twitch on a timer. Simplest to run.
eventsub.mode_off_desc: Live detection stays off. Schedules won't start recordings on their own.
eventsub.direct_callback_hint: Add this as the callback URL in your Twitch app. ReplayVOD builds it from your server's public URL.
eventsub.direct_needs_public_url: Set your server's public URL to use direct mode.
eventsub.relay_url_hint: Paste the relay URL from your Connect account. ReplayVOD works out the rest.
eventsub.no_snapshot_yet: No snapshot yet — click Poll now to fetch current state.

webhook.title: Recording webhook
webhook.description: Fire a signed HTTP POST when a recording finishes or fails.
webhook.page_description: Send a signed event to your own endpoint whenever a recording reaches a terminal state — wire it to notifications, a media-server refresh, or post-processing.
webhook.url_hint: https for a public host; http is allowed for localhost or a private/LAN address. Link-local/metadata addresses are not allowed.
webhook.events_required: Pick at least one event, or disable the webhook.
webhook.secret_hint: Each delivery is signed HMAC-SHA256 over id + timestamp + body, sent in the Replayvod-Webhook-Signature header. Verify it with this secret.
webhook.rotate_confirm_body: The current secret stops working immediately. Any receiver verifying deliveries must be updated with the new secret, or its signature checks will fail.
webhook.deliveries_description: Durable delivery history with retry state. Failed and rejected deliveries can be queued again.
webhook.deliveries_empty: No deliveries yet. Send a test or wait for the next recording.

playback_cache.title: Playback cache
playback_cache.page_description: Generate copy-only playback files the first time a compatible multipart recording is played.
playback_cache.card_description: Ready files are used by the watch player; while one is building, parts still play normally.
playback_cache.max_percent_hint: Percent of the local storage filesystem reserved for generated playback files. Least-recently-used files are evicted over the limit.
playback_cache.save_failed: Failed to save playback cache settings
playback_cache.load_failed: Failed to load playback cache settings
